positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for multiple_birth_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u33,negated_conjecture,
    born_in_multiple_birth(luke)).

cnf(u38,axiom,
    lives_with_strangers(luke)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~spends_time_with_siblings(X0) | lives_at_home(X0)).

cnf(u42,axiom,
    ~lives_at_home(luke)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~has_siblings_born_together(X0) | born_in_multiple_birth(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~lives_with_strangers(X0) | ~lives_at_home(X0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~complains_about_siblings(X0) | has_siblings_born_together(X0)).

cnf(u41,axiom,
    ~has_siblings_born_together(X0) | spends_time_with_siblings(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for multiple_birth_negative
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,negated_conjecture,
    ~born_in_multiple_birth(luke)).

cnf(u21,negated_conjecture,
    ~lives_with_strangers(luke)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define lives_at_home(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define spends_time_with_siblings(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define has_siblings_born_together(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define complains_about_siblings(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
